en.extract:
The little Inca finch (Incaspiza watkinsi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''little Inca finch''' ('''''Incaspiza watkinsi''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Peru]] where its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical dry [[shrubland]]. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
